errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Morning journal prompt failed to run — rate limit hit at 6AM during the burst of morning cron jobs. [10 jobs affected]
errors.suggestedFix: Stagger morning cron schedules by at least 10–15 minutes to avoid simultaneous Anthropic API calls.

errors.meaning: Weekly Toggl time summary failed to post — delivery config uses short channel ID without 'channel:' prefix.
errors.suggestedFix: Update job delivery.to from 'C0AMWT9JB5Y' to 'channel:C0AMWT9JB5Y' to match required format.
